## Resume Builder Project Setup

### Project Overview
Full-stack resume builder application with React frontend and Express.js backend.

### Setup Status
- [x] Project structure created
- [x] Backend scaffolded with Express.js
- [x] Frontend scaffolded with React
- [x] API routes configured
- [x] Styling configured
- [x] Documentation created

### Next Steps
1. Install dependencies in both client and server folders
2. Run `npm install` in the server folder
3. Run `npm install` in the client folder
4. Start the backend: `cd server && npm start`
5. Start the frontend: `cd client && npm start`

### File Structure
- `/server` - Express backend with API routes
- `/client` - React frontend with components
- `/client/src/components` - React components (ResumeForm, ResumePreview)
- `README.md` - Project documentation

### Key Files
- `server/server.js` - Main backend server
- `server/routes/resumes.js` - API routes
- `client/src/App.jsx` - Main React component
- `client/src/components/ResumeForm.jsx` - Resume form component
- `client/src/components/ResumePreview.jsx` - Resume preview component
